text: Aaj subah jo hua uske baad mere andar jeene ki koi ummeed nahi bachi. Andar se poori tarah toot gayi hoon main, par rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational betrayal from her father and her forced silence.
text: Jin pita ke ghar ko aap apna sabse aakhri sahara manti thin, unhone hi aage badh kar rasta band kar diya, aur itni takleef mein bhi parivaar ki shanti ke liye aapko apne ansoon peene pade.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi
text: Ansoon peene ke alawa koi chara nahi hai na. Ek dependent homemaker hoon main, hath mein apne paise toh hai nahi. speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to the stigma cue with a soft, validating reflection of her feared consequence (Lens E).

coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi

Main waise hi saas-bahu ke roz ke taano mein mari jaa rahi thi, ab toh pati ko bhi bolne ka mauka mil gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the impact of the husband's reaction since two restatements have occurred.

coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi

Mujhe lene toh maike wale nahi aayenge, toh kya mere bacchon ko saas aise hi taane maar maar ke bda karegi? Baccho ki parvarish ki wajah se mai aaj bhi is toxic marriage mein rehne ko majboor hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the mild risk flag, then mirroring the deep sense of maternal duty keeping her there (Lens B).

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi
text: Sahi kaha apne. Maa hoon, isliye apne sapne bhoolkar roj chulha chaukha karti hoon. Lekin purane love marriage wale past ko leke meri saas ab aur zyada character pe shakk karegi. Main kuch jawab nahi de sakti, bas sir jhuka ke sunna mera naseeb ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the ongoing time/duration she has been suffering for her past choices (Lens D).

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a question around the relationship limitation since two restatements passed.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi
text: Koi nahi hai. Husband, saas, maike wale... sab mere khilaf khade hain aaj. Aisa lagta hai ki maine poori duniya ke khilaf koi crime kar diya ho aur ab char diwari me mujhe kaid karke maarne ka intezaam hai. Aur ye sabko lagta hai ki mujhe chup reh kar guzara karna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the trapped/helpless core emotion associated with C3 & Relational Preservation.
text: Itni lambi tanhayi aur kisi ke na hone se lagta hai jaise aap poori tarah se TRAPPED aur helpless ho chuki hain — jahan saare rishte ek hi kamre mein bediyan ban kar aapke hisse ki saari azadi aur sakoon cheen rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the feeling of being trapped by connecting it to the structural expectations of homemakers in the region.

coping_shade_signal: rishto ka lihaz rakhte huye main khamosh rahi

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her anger about the betrayal and the financial vulnerability it created (Lens C).
